examples: The hard shell on a beetle is an outside protection, as is the "skin", called cuticle, of an earthworm.
When genetic characterization of the contents of beetle guts gave some unexpected results, the researchers decided to take a closer look at earthworm DNA.
The anatomy of an earthworm is much simpler than that of a man.
My seven-year-old daughter immediately recognised that the creature in the apple was in fact an earthworm (Lumbricus terrestris).
After a move to the US, he founded Shiny Entertainment in 1993, scoring an instant hit with Earthworm Jim.
